About Our Company

Who We Are

New Shivam Enterprises is a premier national provider of electronic security and surveillance integration. We specialize in supply, installation, testing, and lifecycle maintenance of security products for homes, offices, factories, retail shops, and public buildings across India.

Our Mission

To deploy state-of-the-art electronic security tools that guarantee peace of mind, operational efficiency, and absolute safety for our clients.

Our Vision

To become India's most trusted security systems integrator, recognized for professional execution, pricing transparency, and 24/7 service.

Whether you need a single Wi-Fi camera for your home, a multisite biometric cloud sync for your office network, or a comprehensive Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC) for a commercial factory - our certified engineering teams handle everything from site assessment to live execution.

Smooth Execution

How We Work

Our systematic approach ensures that you get the most efficient, cost-effective, and robust security system configured for your environment.

Step 1

Submit Enquiry

Request a quote or site survey through our online portal, phone, or WhatsApp.

Step 2

Expert Response

Our dedicated security coordinator contacts you within 15 minutes of receiving the query.

Step 3

Requirement Discussion

We review your layout plans, perimeter security vulnerabilities, and system integrations.

Step 4

Site Survey & Consult

For complex installations, an engineer performs a physical site assessment to identify blind spots.

Step 5

Product Curation

We select optimized brands (CP Plus, Hikvision, Dahua, etc.) that match your technical budget.

Step 6

Quotation Approval

Receive a transparent, line-item commercial offer with warranty details. Zero hidden costs.

Step 7

Professional Installation

Certified field engineers pull structural cables, install cameras, and test signal lines.

Step 8

Testing & Training

We configure mobile view, set up local recordings, and train your staff on how to review historical footage.

Step 9

AMC & After-Sales Support

Stay covered with our 1-year installation warranty, OEM backup, and Annual Maintenance Contracts.

Our Products & Services

Complete Security Catalog

We deploy certified components from top global brands, guaranteeing absolute operational uptime.

Best Seller

CCTV Surveillance

Advanced surveillance camera setups engineered for crisp video recording in high contrast, color night vision, or thermal ranges.

  • Dome, Bullet & PTZ Cameras
  • IP Cameras & HD Analog
  • Color Night Vision & AI Analytics
  • Solar-Powered Wireless CCTV
Query Product

Recording Systems

Industrial-grade recorders designed to capture, encode, and sync massive high-resolution feeds to local storage or cloud databases.

  • Digital Video Recorders (DVR)
  • Network Video Recorders (NVR)
  • Surveillance Hard Drives (WD/Seagate)
  • Secure Cloud Backup Solutions
Query Product

Access Control

Prevent unauthorized entry with absolute terminal authentication for server rooms, secure offices, and warehouses.

  • RFID Card Door Access
  • Biometric Fingerprint Access
  • Face Recognition Terminals
  • Smart Locks & Magnetic Bolts
Query Product
Corporate

Biometric Attendance

Automate work timings and sync logs directly to your payroll. Integrated cloud panels support remote employees.

  • Face & Fingerprint Terminals
  • Cloud Attendance Integration
  • Employee Shift Scheduling Software
  • Excel Log Export & API Hooks
Query Product

Video Door Phones

Interact with front-gate visitors safely from multi-indoor screens or direct notifications on your smartphone.

  • High Definition Video Door Phones
  • Two-Way Audio Gate intercoms
  • Smart Wi-Fi Doorbells with motion trigger
  • Remote Lock Release Support
Query Product

Office Networking

Robust network installation to connect IP Cameras, workstations, and server racks cleanly with structural cabling.

  • LAN Networking & Office Setup
  • Commercial Wi-Fi Access Points
  • Structured Cat6 Cabling
  • Router Configuration & Firewall Setup
Query Product

Security Accessories

Heavy-duty installation spares that ensure lightning surge protection, dust sealing, and cable organization.

  • CCTV Copper Cables & Racks
  • SMPS Central Power Supplies
  • PoE Switches & Connectors
  • Weatherproof Junction Boxes
Query Product
Premium Care

AMC Services

Maximize hardware lifespan. Our custom Annual Maintenance Contracts cover routine cleaning, testing, and backup audits.

  • Preventive Hardware Audits
  • DVR / NVR Health & Backup Audits
  • Camera Lens Dust Cleaning
  • Emergency Breakdown Diagnostics

Company Strengths

Why Choose New Shivam Enterprises

We set the industry benchmark for commercial-grade CCTV security installations across India.

Certified Installation Team

Our core technical team comprises certified network administrators and experienced hardware technicians.

Genuine Products

Direct OEM agreements mean you get 100% genuine equipment from CP Plus, Hikvision, Dahua, Matrix, and Seagate.

Affordable Pricing

Transparent estimates with detailed component costs. Zero extra surcharges during final invoicing.

PAN India Enquiry Support

A unified sales grid ensures seamless delivery, scheduling, and project consultation across major Indian states.

Fast Response

We dispatch quote options within hours and guarantee next-day deployment for standard orders.

Warranty Support

Full 1 to 2-year manufacturer warranties backed by our rapid physical replacement assistance.

AMC Contracts

Flexible packages with scheduled system updates and diagnostics, preventing sudden hardware drops.

Dedicated Support

A direct customer care hotline ensures quick phone and remote desktop diagnostics.

Common Inquiries

Frequently Asked Questions

Get fast answers to common questions regarding CCTV camera deployment, access control, biometrics, and warranties.

How much does a CCTV camera installation cost?

CCTV installation costs depend on the camera type (HD Analog vs. IP Network), cable length, and recording storage requirements. A basic 4-camera setup with NVR/DVR and hard drive typically starts around ₹12,000 to ₹18,000. Contact us for a precise, component-wise quote.

Which camera is best: Analog, IP, or Wi-Fi?

Analog HD cameras are best for budget-conscious properties. IP cameras offer superior 4K clarity, advanced AI analytics, and clean network cabling. Wi-Fi cameras are perfect for quick single-point installation in homes and small shops where cabling is not feasible.

Do you provide warranties on products and installations?

Yes. All hardware (CP Plus, Hikvision, Dahua, etc.) carries a 1-year to 2-year OEM manufacturer warranty. Additionally, New Shivam Enterprises provides a 1-year comprehensive installation warranty covering on-site technical issues and cable line repairs.

What is included in a CCTV Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC)?

Our security AMC includes scheduled quarterly preventive site visits, dust cleaning of lenses, DVR/NVR hard drive diagnostics, system firmware upgrades, backup verification, and unlimited breakdown calls with prioritized next-day resolutions.

Do you provide installation services anywhere in India?

Yes, New Shivam Enterprises provides project design and remote consultation PAN India. We have a network of verified installation technicians who execute deployments in all major Tier-1 and Tier-2 cities under our direct project supervision.

How many cameras do I need to secure my property?

Camera requirements vary based on square footage, entry points, and blind spots. A standard 2-BHK home typically requires 2 to 4 cameras, while offices and retail shops need 4 to 8 cameras to secure checkout areas and exits. We provide free layout plans during our consultations.

Can I monitor my security cameras on my mobile phone?

Absolutely! We configure official mobile applications (gCMOB, Hik-Connect, DMSS) on your smartphones, tablets, or laptops. You can view live video feeds, access historical recordings, and receive motion alerts remotely from anywhere in the world.
